description: Focused workload for benchmarking exact and semantic response caching against the current baseline.

prompt_groups.canonical: Explain how semantic caching reduces repeated LLM inference cost on CPU servers.
paraphrases: How does semantic caching lower repeated CPU inference cost for LLM serving?
Why can semantic caches reduce the cost of repeated LLM requests on CPU?

prompt_groups.canonical: Describe why quantization helps large language models run faster on CPUs.
paraphrases: Why does quantization make LLM inference faster on CPU hardware?
Explain how lower precision weights improve CPU performance for language models.

prompt_groups.canonical: Summarize the role of KV-cache in long-context transformer generation.
paraphrases: What does the KV cache do for long-context transformer decoding?
Explain why a KV cache matters during long-context text generation.

prompt_groups.canonical: List practical optimizations for running transformer inference efficiently on CPU.
paraphrases: What practical tricks help transformer inference run efficiently on CPUs?
Name useful optimizations for efficient CPU-based transformer inference.
